Package oberon

Class OberonScanner

    • oberon.OberonScanner

extends java.lang.Object

      static class  OberonScanner.Token
      Token class: pair of type and optional semantic value.

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int getColumn()
      Returns the current column number (1-based).
      int getLine()
      Returns the current line number (1-based).

      OberonScanner.Token next()
      Reads and consumes the next token.
      OberonScanner.Token peek()
      Reads the next token without consuming it.

      • getLine

        public int getLine()
        Returns the current line number (1-based).

        public int getColumn()
        Returns the current column number (1-based).

      • peek

        public OberonScanner.Token peek()
                         throws OberonException,
                                java.io.IOException
        Reads the next token without consuming it.

        OberonException
        java.io.IOException
